sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n78054" key="paraine/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραιν-έτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">=</abbr> foreg.; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">π. γυναικῶν</foreign> <sense id="n78054.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seducer</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:44:25" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44.25</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
